code:
import io
import string
import list

fn classify(_ token: String, _ evens: List<Int>, _ odds: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      list.push(evens, v)
    else
      evens
    end
  when None
    evens
  end
end

fn classify_odd(_ token: String, _ odds: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    if v % 2 == 0
      odds
    else
      list.push(odds, v)
    end
  when None
    odds
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)

  mut evens: List<Int> = []
  mut odds: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0

  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(bv)
      if is_ws(bv)
        if string.len(token) > 0
          evens = classify(token, evens, odds)
          odds = classify_odd(token, odds)
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(bv)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if string.len(token) > 0
    evens = classify(token, evens, odds)
    odds = classify_odd(token, odds)
  end

  mut evens_str = "evens="
  mut first_e = true
  for v in evens
    if first_e
      evens_str = "#{evens_str}#{v}"
      first_e = false
    else
      evens_str = "#{evens_str} #{v}"
    end
  end
  println(evens_str)

  mut odds_str = "odds="
  mut first_o = true
  for v in odds
    if first_o
      odds_str = "#{odds_str}#{v}"
      first_o = false
    else
      odds_str = "#{odds_str} #{v}"
    end
  end
  println(odds_str)
end
